_provenance.scope: TARGET site-level design system sidecar — single variant (Mode A). No page-level deployment.

hl-blue.role: page-surface-dark · dominant ground · text on light surfaces

hl-fiddle-bone.role: page-surface-light · light-interlude ground · text on dark surfaces

hl-cardinal.role: loud-accent · primary CTA fill · flag-ground (at most one section per route)

hl-butterfly.role: light-spark · Blue Ridge Blue surface · non-body accents only

spacing.rhythm: alternate 96px and 64px section padding across sections to prevent monotony

tokens.elevation: flat-by-conviction — no drop shadows, no gradient elevation; depth via atmospheric radial gradients and hand-painted asset materiality only

button-primary.fill: hl-fiddle-bone on dark ground; hl-cardinal on light ground
button-primary.label: italic-classical-serif 20px

card.treatment: single-instance only — NOT used in 3-col identical grids; multi-instance content is rendered as multiple full-bleed sections instead

eyebrow.treatment: IBM Plex Mono uppercase 13px tracking 0.08em color hl-honey

pull-quote.treatment: Spectral italic 26px line 1.4; cite in mono uppercase tracking 0.08em

ornament-rule.treatment: inline SVG hand-painted divider — rough strokes, currentColor, NEVER a 1px horizontal rule

typographyMeta.expectedCharacter: italic-classical-serif at scale — Playfair Display italic; mixed-case display; numerals + measurables in mono
rejectedCharacters: roman display (forbidden — reads too rigid for music-coded brand)
typographyMeta.loadBearingRule: italic-at-display is load-bearing; if the rendered HTML does not load Playfair Display + Cormorant Infant + Spectral + IBM Plex Mono via @font-face or Google Fonts, validation fails

paletteDeployment.cardinalFlashRule: at-most-one-section-per-route as flag ground; never as body background; never as text color larger than micro-label

modeDetectionTrace: captured signal classification: signal-strong (7 palette tokens · 3 type families · 3 imagery lanes)
rebrand triggers: none (no rebrand phrase, --rebrand flag not passed, signal-strong present)

craft.picked_by: anchor-reference: brand/BRAND.md (Lane 3 imagery + 1960s Italian travel-poster reference)

brand_faithful_inversions.rationale: captured display family is Playfair Display italic; the italic forms read as singing, central to brand voice
brand register is meditative / memoir; all-caps reads as shouting
drenched palette + airy spacing already carry visual energy; type tier balances by reading quietly
central tension demands both halves at full volume; restrained or committed deployment collapses Italian half into Mountain half
loud-accent role rule; multiple cardinal sections would read trattoria
captured discipline; reads as measured rather than decorative

anti_toolbox_hits.justification: explicit user preference + brand central tension demands wide saturation deployment
brand-faithful inversion; captured display family is italic
brand imagery Lane 1 — cinematic Blue Ridge atmosphere as section ground (not depth-as-elevation)

inputs.treatment: deferred to contact page; home has no form components

componentStyle.dualCTAPattern: FORBIDDEN — Generic-2026-SaaS silhouette anti-reference. Hero CTA pair must be (primary fill) + (secondary text-link), NOT two visually-equivalent fills.

header.purpose: site nav + credits-bar with vol/no marker

section-opener.purpose: italic-display section heading with ornament-rule + eyebrow above

dos: Specifics over modifiers — 'ten miles past anywhere', 'elevation 4,140 ft', '1983 in Verona'.
Reverent, not irreverent. Joy, not fun.
donts: No editorial-register chrome vocabulary (atelier, the journal, dispatches).
No Italian-language words anywhere (trattoria, piazza, dolce).
No em-dashes (per impeccable shared design laws).

narrative.northStar: A site that sounds like meditative single-voice mountain music and looks like a 1960s Italian summer travel poster — at the same time, at full volume on both halves.
narrative.overview: High Lonesome is a single-maker Appalachian botanical-spirits house in Hot Springs NC. The brand site holds two halves in tension: auditory solitude (single-voice mountain music register, first-person Sadie narrator, slow declaratives, reverent tone) and visual joy (a saturated 7-token Mediterranean-pop palette deployed across ≥ 4 distinct grounds, italic-classical-serif display reading as singing, hand-painted bottle labels). Mode A brand-faithful: palette and type pinned, drenched palette intensity, italic-display load-bearing.
keyCharacteristics: drenched palette deployment — 4 distinct grounds across 10 home sections, asymmetric cycling
italic-classical-serif display at scale, mixed-case (never all-caps)
cardinal-flash limited to one section per route as the brand's loudest moment
atmospheric radial-gradient grounds reference Blue Ridge sunsets / mountain laurel / sourwood honey
first-person singular Sadie narrator, plainspoken declaratives
numerals + measurables always in mono — measured, not decorative
rules: italic-at-display required across all display sizes (≥ 48px)
cardinal-flash limited to one section per route as flag ground; never body background; never text >micro-label
drenched palette deployment — ≥ 4 distinct section grounds on any multi-section route
Italian DNA implicit only — palette deploys it, copy never names it
no 3-col identical card grid — multi-instance content renders as multiple full-bleed sections
no centered SaaS hero with dual-CTA pair (Generic-2026-SaaS silhouette anti-reference)
dos: Drench every section in a brand color — high-lonesome-blue is dominant, not exclusive.
Use italic display at scale (≥ 48px) for every headline.
Vary section padding (96px / 64px alternation) so rhythm doesn't flatten.
Render the three bottles as three full-bleed sections, each with its own ground.
Reference Blue Ridge atmosphere in section grounds (radial gradients, mountain silhouettes).
donts: Gradient text, glassmorphism, hero-metric template, modal-first (impeccable absolute bans).
Centered SaaS hero with dual-CTA pair.
